goal: B3: 修复 #14 — useAI 消息列表改为 React useState，组件可感知消息变化

coverage_checklist.messages_use_state: assert: useAI 使用 useState<ChatMessage[]> 管理 messages
coverage_checklist.loading_error_preserved: assert: loading 和 error 的 useState 逻辑保持不变
coverage_checklist.streaming_update_works: assert: 流式内容更新通过 setMessages 函数式更新实现
coverage_checklist.callback_compat: assert: setMessageUpdateCallback 向后兼容，仍通知调用方
coverage_checklist.typecheck_pass: assert: bun run typecheck 通过
coverage_checklist.test_pass: assert: bun run test 通过
